sourcesContent:
const therapistResponses = [
  {
    category: "understanding_feelings",
    keywords: ["sad", "why do i feel", "emotions", "overthink", "mood change"],
    emotion: "💗 Empathy",
    reply:
      "It’s completely okay to feel this way. Sometimes emotions surface without a clear reason because your mind is processing stress, expectations, or unexpressed thoughts. Let’s gently explore what might be influencing you.",
    songs: [
      "Fix You – Coldplay",
      "Let It Be – The Beatles",
      "Someone Like You – Adele",
    ],
  },

  {
    category: "anxiety_stress",
    keywords: ["anxious", "panic", "stress", "exam", "interview", "future"],
    emotion: "🫂 Calm Support",
    reply:
      "Anxiety often comes from fear of the unknown or pressure to perform. You’re not weak for feeling this — you’re human. Let’s slow things down together and focus on what you can control right now.",
    songs: [
      "Weightless – Marconi Union",
      "Breathe Me – Sia",
      "Daylight – Taylor Swift",
    ],
  },

  {
    category: "self_improvement",
    keywords: ["confidence", "self esteem", "compare", "failure", "motivation"],
    emotion: "🌱 Growth",
    reply:
      "Building confidence is a journey, not a switch. Every small effort you make matters, even on days when it doesn’t feel like it. Let’s talk about one strength you already have.",
    songs: [
      "Unstoppable – Sia",
      "Hall of Fame – The Script",
      "Fight Song – Rachel Platten",
    ],
  },

  {
    category: "relationships",
    keywords: ["lonely", "relationships", "attached", "toxic", "people"],
    emotion: "💞 Connection",
    reply:
      "Feeling lonely or emotionally attached doesn’t mean something is wrong with you. It often means you care deeply. Let’s explore how you can protect your emotional well-being while staying connected.",
    songs: [
      "Lovely – Billie Eilish",
      "Someone To You – BANNERS",
      "Let Me Down Slowly – Alec Benjamin",
    ],
  },

  {
    category: "habits_lifestyle",
    keywords: ["sleep", "routine", "addiction", "phone", "time management"],
    emotion: "🕊 Balance",
    reply:
      "Your daily habits quietly shape your mental health. Small changes — like better sleep or reduced screen time — can make a big difference over time. We can take this one step at a time.",
    songs: [
      "Better Days – OneRepublic",
      "Good Days – SZA",
      "Sunday Best – Surfaces",
    ],
  },

  {
    category: "career_pressure",
    keywords: ["career", "placements", "future", "family expectations", "path"],
    emotion: "🎓 Guidance",
    reply:
      "Career pressure can feel overwhelming, especially when expectations pile up. Remember, your path doesn’t need to look like anyone else’s. Let’s focus on clarity, not comparison.",
    songs: [
      "Vienna – Billy Joel",
      "The Climb – Miley Cyrus",
      "My Pace – Stray Kids",
    ],
  },

  {
    category: "coping_techniques",
    keywords: ["overwhelmed", "breathing", "grounding", "mindfulness", "spiral"],
    emotion: "🧘 Calm Practice",
    reply:
      "When things feel overwhelming, grounding yourself in the present can help. Try this: take a slow breath in for 4 seconds, hold for 4, and breathe out for 6. You’re safe right now.",
    songs: [
      "River – Leon Bridges",
      "Holocene – Bon Iver",
      "Night Changes – One Direction",
    ],
  },
];

export default therapistResponses;
